mapper.sql: select plan_id, plan_code, plan_name, plan_type, plan_status, source_plan_id, event_id, algorithm_name, strategy_type, schedule_start_time, schedule_end_time, kpi_json, ai_explanation, active_flag, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from aps_schedule_plan
mapper.select:
select p.plan_id, p.plan_code, p.plan_name, p.plan_type, p.plan_status, p.source_plan_id, p.event_id, p.algorithm_name, p.strategy_type, p.schedule_start_time, p.schedule_end_time, p.kpi_json, p.ai_explanation, p.active_flag, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark, coalesce(task_stats.total_task_count, 0) as total_task_count, coalesce(task_stats.participating_product_count, 0) as participating_product_count,
(select count(1) from aps_schedule_task current_product_task where current_product_task.plan_id = p.plan_id and current_product_task.product_id = #{productId} and (current_product_task.del_flag = '0' or current_product_task.del_flag is null))
0 as current_product_task_count, 'GLOBAL' as plan_scope from aps_schedule_plan p left join ( select plan_id, count(1) as total_task_count, count(distinct product_id) as participating_product_count from aps_schedule_task where del_flag = '0' or del_flag is null group by plan_id ) task_stats on task_stats.plan_id = p.plan_id
and (p.del_flag = '0' or p.del_flag is null) and p.plan_code like concat('%', #{planCode}, '%') and p.plan_name like concat('%', #{planName}, '%') and p.plan_type like concat('%', #{planType}, '%') and p.plan_status like concat('%', #{planStatus}, '%') and p.active_flag like concat('%', #{activeFlag}, '%')
and exists ( select 1 from aps_schedule_task product_task where product_task.plan_id = p.plan_id and product_task.product_id = #{productId} and (product_task.del_flag = '0' or product_task.del_flag is null) )
where plan_id = #{planId} and (del_flag = '0' or del_flag is null)
where plan_type = 'INITIAL' and active_flag = 'Y' and (del_flag = '0' or del_flag is null) order by plan_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into aps_schedule_plan
plan_code, plan_name, plan_type, plan_status, source_plan_id, event_id, algorithm_name, strategy_type, schedule_start_time, schedule_end_time, kpi_json, ai_explanation, active_flag, del_flag, create_by, remark, create_time
#{planCode}, #{planName}, #{planType}, #{planStatus}, #{sourcePlanId}, #{eventId}, #{algorithmName}, #{strategyType}, #{scheduleStartTime}, #{scheduleEndTime}, #{kpiJson}, #{aiExplanation}, #{activeFlag}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate()
mapper.update:
update aps_schedule_plan
plan_code = #{planCode}, plan_name = #{planName}, plan_type = #{planType}, plan_status = #{planStatus}, source_plan_id = #{sourcePlanId}, event_id = #{eventId}, algorithm_name = #{algorithmName}, strategy_type = #{strategyType}, schedule_start_time = #{scheduleStartTime}, schedule_end_time = #{scheduleEndTime}, kpi_json = #{kpiJson}, ai_explanation = #{aiExplanation}, active_flag = #{activeFlag}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = sysdate()
where plan_id = #{planId} and (del_flag = '0' or del_flag is null)
update aps_schedule_plan set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{operatorName}, update_time = sysdate() where plan_id = #{planId} and (del_flag = '0' or del_flag is null)
mapper.select: select count(1) from aps_schedule_plan where source_plan_id = #{sourcePlanId} and (del_flag = '0' or del_flag is null)
mapper.update: update aps_schedule_plan set active_flag = 'N', plan_status = 'HISTORY', update_time = sysdate() where plan_type = 'INITIAL' and active_flag = 'Y' and (del_flag = '0' or del_flag is null)
